MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-14-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE SEP-14-2020 HEARING RE: REAL PARTY IN INTEREST BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-14-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: REAL PARTY IN INTEREST BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the real party in interest is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
